name: SPYRAL GEAR - Fully Armed
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＰＹＲＡＬ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スパイラル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＧＥＡＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－エクストラアームズ
desc: Equip only to "SPYRAL Super Agent". It gains 1000 ATK. If it destroys your opponent's monster by battle: You can banish both the opponent's destroyed monster and 1 other card your opponent controls. When this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "SPYRAL Super Agent" in your Graveyard; Special Summon it.
eff: Equip only to "SPYRAL Super Agent". It gains 1000 ATK. If it destroys your opponent's monster by battle: You can banish both the opponent's destroyed monster and 1 other card your opponent controls. When this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "SPYRAL Super Agent" in your Graveyard; Special Summon it.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Activates if destroyed by card effect
misc: Equips only to a specific target
